---
title: "{{< meta course_title >}}"
deck_short_title: "{{< meta decks.d04.short_title >}}"
subtitle: |
  <span class="deck-title">{{< meta decks.d04.title >}}</span><br>
  <span class="deck-meta">{{< meta texts.cb.short >}} Ch. 11<br> 
  </span>
---


{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/linear/linear_frame.qmd >}}


&nbsp;


::: {.deck-nav}
[← {{< meta decks.d03.title >}}]({{< meta decks.d03.file >}}){.deck-prev}
:::
